title: Lace Market Apartment
address: 12 Fletcher Gate, Lace Market, Nottingham, NG1 2FZ
description: A beautifully presented two-bedroom apartment in the heart of Nottingham's historic Lace Market district. Exposed brick walls, high ceilings and large sash windows give this apartment real character. Walking distance to the city centre, bars, restaurants and tram stops.

title: West Bridgford Garden Flat
address: 34 Melton Road, West Bridgford, Nottingham, NG2 7NE
description: A charming ground-floor flat in the sought-after West Bridgford area. Private garden, off-street parking and recently refurbished kitchen and bathroom. Quiet residential street, excellent local schools and just minutes from the Victoria Embankment.

title: Beeston Studio Apartment
description: A modern, well-equipped studio apartment a short walk from Beeston town centre and the tram line into Nottingham city centre. Ideal for young professionals or students. Bills-included option available.
